_readme: Drum pattern for 'Settling In' (baseline draft, no specialized tooling). Steps are 16th notes, 16 per bar (0-indexed, step 0 = beat 1). Each groove lists, per instrument, the steps that are hit with a velocity (0-127). bar_map assigns which groove plays in each of the 20 bars. Swing/humanization (micro-timing push on off-beat steps, small velocity variation) is applied only in generate_midi.py, not encoded here — this file is the quantized pattern.

intro._feel: very sparse, quiet late-night: just a soft kick on 1 and a quarter-note hihat pulse, no snare at all

main._feel: settled laid-back pocket: kick on 1 and the 'a' of 3 (syncopated), snare on 2 and 4, one soft ghost snare pushing into the next bar, 8th-note hihat with light downbeat accent

sectionB._feel: slightly busier / more present, matching the 'searching' energy of the B section: extra kick, extra ghost snare, hihat a touch louder overall

calm._feel: transition down from sectionB back toward quiet: kick on 1 only, soft quarter-note hihat pulse, only a soft backbeat on 4 (no snare on 2)

outro._feel: sparse half-time pulse, no snare at all, letting the harmony do the work while the drums recede

final._feel: near-silence for the last bar: one soft kick, nothing else. Deliberately no cymbal swell or fill -- brief asked for settling, not a triumphant ending
